questions: Q1: Were all 8 implementation steps from the plan executed successfully?
Q2: Do the code changes satisfy all 10 acceptance criteria from the ticket?
Q3: Did the quality gates (typecheck and build) pass clean?
Q4: Were any files changed beyond the planned two-file scope?
Q5: Are there any unresolved follow-ups or deviations from the plan?

answers.answer: Yes, all 8 steps were executed in order: (1) CreateTicketResponse type updated with optional shortId and mode, (2) VALID_MODES constant and getFlag('--mode') parsing added, (3) case-insensitive validation with error handling added, (4) POST body conditionally includes mode via spread, (5) shortId output guarded with nullish coalescing, (6) conditional mode display added to success output, (7) usage text updated in index.ts, (8) typecheck and build run and passed.
evidence: src/tickets/create.ts: 50 lines after changes — type at L5-8, VALID_MODES at L10, parsing at L23, validation at L25-32, body at L36, shortId guard at L42, mode display at L44-46

answers.answer: Yes, all 10 acceptance criteria are satisfied: (1-5) All 5 modes accepted and sent to API, (6) omitting --mode sends no mode field, (7) invalid mode 'banana' would fail with allowed-values message before API call, (8) mode displayed in success output when present, (9) shortId never shows 'undefined' due to ?? '(pending)' guard, (10) usage text documents --mode with all allowed values.
evidence: src/tickets/create.ts L25-32: validation block rejects invalid modes with console.error + process.exit(1) before hxFetch at L34
src/tickets/create.ts L36: ...(mode && { mode }) conditionally includes mode in body
src/tickets/create.ts L42: data.ticket.shortId ?? '(pending)' prevents undefined display

answers.answer: Yes, both quality gates passed clean. npm run typecheck (tsc --noEmit) exited with code 0. npm run build (tsc) exited with code 0.
No. Only the planned two files were modified: src/tickets/create.ts and src/tickets/index.ts. Verified by re-reading src/lib/flags.ts, src/lib/http.ts, and src/index.ts — all unchanged.
evidence: src/lib/flags.ts: Read tool reported 'File unchanged since last read'
src/lib/http.ts: Re-read confirmed original content intact
src/index.ts: Re-read confirmed original content intact

answers.answer: No deviations from the plan. Two known limitations exist but are pre-existing conditions, not follow-ups: (1) no test framework in the repo means no automated test coverage, (2) runtime API behavior cannot be tested without a live backend.
evidence: package.json: no test script, no test dependencies

statement: Implementation of HLX-343 is complete. Added --mode flag to hlx tickets create with case-insensitive validation against 5 allowed modes (AUTO, BUILD, FIX, RESEARCH, EXECUTE), conditional body inclusion, shortId guard preventing 'undefined' display, conditional mode output, and updated usage text. Two files changed (src/tickets/create.ts, src/tickets/index.ts). Typecheck and build pass clean. All 5 verification checks pass.
